con:part.con:content: <definitions targetNamespace="urn:CPA" xmlns:SOAP-ENV="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:SOAP-ENC="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" xmlns:tns="urn:CPA" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/"> <types> <xsd:schema targetNamespace="urn:CPA"> <xsd:import namespace="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> <xsd:import namespace="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/"/> <xsd:complexType name="args"> <xsd:all> <xsd:element name="idSistema" type="xsd:int"/> <xsd:element name="login" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="pwd" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:all> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="matr"> <xsd:all> <xsd:element name="idSistema" type="xsd:int"/> <xsd:element name="matricula" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:all> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="funcs"> <xsd:all> <xsd:element name="idSistema" type="xsd:int"/> <xsd:element name="idFuncionalidade" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:all> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="argsIntegrador"> <xsd:all> <xsd:element name="sistemas" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="login" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="pwd" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:all> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:schema> </types> <message name="LoginRequest"> <part name="args" type="tns:args"/> </message> <message name="LoginResponse"> <part name="return" type="xsd:string"/> </message> <message name="LoginSGDOCRequest"> <part name="args" type="tns:args"/> </message> <message name="LoginSGDOCResponse"> <part name="return" type="xsd:string"/> </message> <message name="LoginASPRequest"> <part name="idSistema" type="xsd:string"/> <part name="login" type="xsd:string"/> <part name="pwd" type="xsd:string"/> </message> <message name="LoginASPResponse"> <part name="return" type="xsd:string"/> </message> <message name="dadosUsuarioRequest"> <part name="matr" type="tns:matr"/> </message> <message name="dadosUsuarioResponse"> <part name="return" type="xsd:string"/> </message> <message name="dadosLotacaoRequest"> <part name="ccusto" type="xsd:string"/> </message> <message name="dadosLotacaoResponse"> <part name="return" type="xsd:string"/> </message> <message name="UsuaWithPermRequest"> <part name="funcs" type="tns:funcs"/> </message> <message name="UsuaWithPermResponse"> <part name="return" type="xsd:string"/> </message> <message name="isUserRequest"> <part name="args" type="tns:args"/> </message> <message name="isUserResponse"> <part name="return" type="xsd:string"/> </message> <message name="validateRequest"> <part name="user" type="xsd:string"/> <part name="pass" type="xsd:string"/> </message> <message name="validateResponse"> <part name="return" type="xsd:string"/> </message> <message name="loadUserRequest"> <part name="args" type="tns:args"/> </message> <message name="loadUserResponse"> <part name="return" type="xsd:string"/> </message> <message name="LoginIntegradorRequest"> <part name="args" type="tns:argsIntegrador"/> </message> <message name="LoginIntegradorResponse"> <part name="return" type="xsd:string"/> </message> <message name="retornaPermissoesSGDOCRequest"> <part name="identifier" type="tns:args"/> </message> <message name="retornaPermissoesSGDOCResponse"> <part name="return" type="xsd:string"/> </message> <portType name="CPAPortType"> <operation name="Login"> <documentation>Says hello to the caller</documentation> <input message="tns:LoginRequest"/> <output message="tns:LoginResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="LoginSGDOC"> <documentation>Says hello to the caller</documentation> <input message="tns:LoginSGDOCRequest"/> <output message="tns:LoginSGDOCResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="LoginASP"> <documentation>Says hello to the caller</documentation> <input message="tns:LoginASPRequest"/> <output message="tns:LoginASPResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="dadosUsuario"> <documentation>Says hello to the caller</documentation> <input message="tns:dadosUsuarioRequest"/> <output message="tns:dadosUsuarioResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="dadosLotacao"> <documentation>Says hello to the caller</documentation> <input message="tns:dadosLotacaoRequest"/> <output message="tns:dadosLotacaoResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="UsuaWithPerm"> <documentation>Says hello to the caller</documentation> <input message="tns:UsuaWithPermRequest"/> <output message="tns:UsuaWithPermResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="isUser"> <documentation>Says hello to the caller</documentation> <input message="tns:isUserRequest"/> <output message="tns:isUserResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="validate"> <documentation>Says hello to the caller</documentation> <input message="tns:validateRequest"/> <output message="tns:validateResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="loadUser"> <documentation>Says hello to the caller</documentation> <input message="tns:loadUserRequest"/> <output message="tns:loadUserResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="LoginIntegrador"> <documentation>Says hello to the caller</documentation> <input message="tns:LoginIntegradorRequest"/> <output message="tns:LoginIntegradorResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="retornaPermissoesSGDOC"> <documentation>Says hello to the caller</documentation> <input message="tns:retornaPermissoesSGDOCRequest"/> <output message="tns:retornaPermissoesSGDOCResponse"/> </operation> </portType> <binding name="CPABinding" type="tns:CPAPortType"> <soap:binding style="rpc" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <operation name="Login"> <soap:operation soapAction="urn:Loginwsdl#Login" style="rpc"/> <input> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:Loginwsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:Loginwsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="LoginSGDOC"> <soap:operation soapAction="urn:Loginwsdl#Login" style="rpc"/> <input> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:Loginwsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:Loginwsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="LoginASP"> <soap:operation soapAction="urn:LoginASPwsdl#LoginASP" style="rpc"/> <input> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:LoginASPwsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:LoginASPwsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="dadosUsuario"> <soap:operation soapAction="urn:dadosUsuariowsdl#dadosUsuario" style="rpc"/> <input> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:dadosUsuariowsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:dadosUsuariowsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="dadosLotacao"> <soap:operation soapAction="urn:dadosLotacaowsdl#dadosLotacao" style="rpc"/> <input> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:dadosLotacaowsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:dadosLotacaowsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="UsuaWithPerm"> <soap:operation soapAction="urn:UsuaWithPermwsdl#UsuaWithPerm" style="rpc"/> <input> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:UsuaWithPermwsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:UsuaWithPermwsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="isUser"> <soap:operation soapAction="urn:isUserwsdl#isUser" style="rpc"/> <input> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:isUserwsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:isUserwsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="validate"> <soap:operation soapAction="urn:validatewsdl#validate" style="rpc"/> <input> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:validatewsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:validatewsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="loadUser"> <soap:operation soapAction="urn:loadUserwsdl#loadUser" style="rpc"/> <input> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:loadUserwsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:loadUserwsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="LoginIntegrador"> <soap:operation soapAction="urn:Loginwsdl#Login" style="rpc"/> <input> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:Loginwsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:Loginwsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="retornaPermissoesSGDOC"> <soap:operation soapAction="urn:retornaPermissoesSGDOCwsdl#retornaPermissoesSGDOC" style="rpc"/> <input> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:retornaPermissoesSGDOCwsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="encoded" namespace="urn:retornaPermissoesSGDOCwsdl" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <service name="CPA"> <port name="CPAPort" binding="tns:CPABinding"> <soap:address location="http://192.168.51.30/CPA/loginUsuario.ws.php"/> </port> </service> </definitions>

con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:urn="urn:dadosUsuariowsdl">\r <soapenv:Header/>\r <soapenv:Body>\r <urn:dadosUsuario soapenv:encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/">\r <matr xsi:type="urn:matr" xmlns:urn="urn:CPA">\r <!--You may enter the following 2 items in any order-->\r <idSistema xsi:type="xsd:int">?</idSistema>\r <matricula xsi:type="xsd:string">?</matricula>\r </matr>\r </urn:dadosUsuario>\r </soapenv:Body>\r </soapenv:Envelope>

con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:urn="urn:isUserwsdl">\r <soapenv:Header/>\r <soapenv:Body>\r <urn:isUser soapenv:encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/">\r <args xsi:type="urn:args" xmlns:urn="urn:CPA">\r <!--You may enter the following 3 items in any order-->\r <idSistema xsi:type="xsd:int">?</idSistema>\r <login xsi:type="xsd:string">?</login>\r <pwd xsi:type="xsd:string">?</pwd>\r </args>\r </urn:isUser>\r </soapenv:Body>\r </soapenv:Envelope>

con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:urn="urn:loadUserwsdl">\r <soapenv:Header/>\r <soapenv:Body>\r <urn:loadUser soapenv:encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/">\r <args xsi:type="urn:args" xmlns:urn="urn:CPA">\r <!--You may enter the following 3 items in any order-->\r <idSistema xsi:type="xsd:int">?</idSistema>\r <login xsi:type="xsd:string">?</login>\r <pwd xsi:type="xsd:string">?</pwd>\r </args>\r </urn:loadUser>\r </soapenv:Body>\r </soapenv:Envelope>

con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:urn="urn:Loginwsdl">\r <soapenv:Header/>\r <soapenv:Body>\r <urn:Login soapenv:encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/">\r <args xsi:type="urn:args" xmlns:urn="urn:CPA">\r <!--You may enter the following 3 items in any order-->\r <idSistema xsi:type="xsd:int">?</idSistema>\r <login xsi:type="xsd:string">?</login>\r <pwd xsi:type="xsd:string">?</pwd>\r </args>\r </urn:Login>\r </soapenv:Body>\r </soapenv:Envelope>

con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:urn="urn:Loginwsdl">\r <soapenv:Header/>\r <soapenv:Body>\r <urn:LoginIntegrador soapenv:encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/">\r <args xsi:type="urn:argsIntegrador" xmlns:urn="urn:CPA">\r <!--You may enter the following 3 items in any order-->\r <sistemas xsi:type="xsd:string">?</sistemas>\r <login xsi:type="xsd:string">?</login>\r <pwd xsi:type="xsd:string">?</pwd>\r </args>\r </urn:LoginIntegrador>\r </soapenv:Body>\r </soapenv:Envelope>

con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:urn="urn:Loginwsdl">\r <soapenv:Header/>\r <soapenv:Body>\r <urn:LoginSGDOC soapenv:encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/">\r <args xsi:type="urn:args" xmlns:urn="urn:CPA">\r <!--You may enter the following 3 items in any order-->\r <idSistema xsi:type="xsd:int">?</idSistema>\r <login xsi:type="xsd:string">?</login>\r <pwd xsi:type="xsd:string">?</pwd>\r </args>\r </urn:LoginSGDOC>\r </soapenv:Body>\r </soapenv:Envelope>

con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:urn="urn:retornaPermissoesSGDOCwsdl">\r <soapenv:Header/>\r <soapenv:Body>\r <urn:retornaPermissoesSGDOC soapenv:encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/">\r <identifier xsi:type="urn:args" xmlns:urn="urn:CPA">\r <!--You may enter the following 3 items in any order-->\r <idSistema xsi:type="xsd:int">?</idSistema>\r <login xsi:type="xsd:string">?</login>\r <pwd xsi:type="xsd:string">?</pwd>\r </identifier>\r </urn:retornaPermissoesSGDOC>\r </soapenv:Body>\r </soapenv:Envelope>

con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:urn="urn:UsuaWithPermwsdl">\r <soapenv:Header/>\r <soapenv:Body>\r <urn:UsuaWithPerm soapenv:encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/">\r <funcs xsi:type="urn:funcs" xmlns:urn="urn:CPA">\r <!--You may enter the following 2 items in any order-->\r <idSistema xsi:type="xsd:int">?</idSistema>\r <idFuncionalidade xsi:type="xsd:string">?</idFuncionalidade>\r </funcs>\r </urn:UsuaWithPerm>\r </soapenv:Body>\r </soapenv:Envelope>

con:mockOperation.name: LoginIntegrador
con:mockOperation.con:dispatchPath:
import com.eviware.soapui.support.XmlHolder
log.info(mockRequest.requestContent) def holder = new com.eviware.soapui.support.XmlHolder( mockRequest.requestContent ) username = holder.getNodeValue("//login") senha = holder.getNodeValue("//pwd") idSistema = holder.getNodeValue("//idSistema") log.info("idSistema:"+ idSistema) log.info("Matricula:"+ username) log.info("Senha:"+ senha)
requestContext.username = username requestContext.idSistema = idSistema
if (senha == null) { requestContext.responseMesssage = "Response 2" } else { requestContext.responseMesssage = "Response 1" } log.info("Response:"+ requestContext.responseMesssage)
return requestContext.responseMesssage

con:response.name: Response 1
con:response.con:responseContent: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:urn="urn:Loginwsdl"> <soapenv:Header/> <soapenv:Body> <urn:LoginResponse soapenv:encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"> <return xsi:type="xsd:string"> {"matricula":"092930", "login":"douglas.garrett", "senha":null, "nome":"DOUGLAS GARRETT DE LIMA","cpf":"08808793788", "email":"douglas.garrett@cmb.gov.br","emailLotacao":"sepn@cmb.gov.br","idLotacao":"E1203", "desLotacao":"DIGES\/DETIC\/DVSN\/SEPN","siglaLotacao":"SEPN","admissao":"15\/07\/2013","aniversario":"24\/09\/1981","ramal":"","ramalLotacao":"","cargo":"ANALISTA - TI\/DESENVOLVIMENTO DE SISTEMA","funcao":"","gestao":null,"permissao":[{"sistema":"40","funcionalidades":[1,2,3,4,6],"lotacoes":[]},{"sistema":"41","funcionalidades":[1,2,3,4,6],"lotacoes":[]},{"sistema":"23","funcionalidades":[],"lotacoes":["31300","E5203"]}],"idUsuario":3950,"status":1}</return> </urn:LoginResponse> </soapenv:Body> </soapenv:Envelope>

con:mockOperation.name: Login
